concerns.text: FR-001 (Download HCP data) is not covered. Task T006 generates simulated topology data but does not implement the download/preprocessing of real HCP fMRI data required by FR-001. The spec assumes simulation is the fallback, but FR-001 mandates the download capability exists.

FR-007 (Validate dataset variables before execution) is not explicitly covered. While T005b/c validate columns, there is no task explicitly implementing the 'halt with clear error if any are missing' logic for the full dataset variables (subject ID, topology metric, entrainment metric) as a pre-execution gate described in FR-007.

FR-008 (Halt with 'Invalid Entrainment Data' error) is not fully covered. T005b validates columns/types but the specific error string 'Invalid Entrainment Data' and the 'halt' behavior are not explicitly assigned to a task. T044 is a test for this, but the implementation task is missing.

FR-010 (Single comparative bar chart with specific title format) is not covered. Task T027 generates the chart but does not explicitly mandate the 'numeric values in the title' format or the 'exactly two bars' constraint in the task description, relying only on the dependency on T027a.

SC-005 (Verify halt on invalid input) is not covered by an implementation task. T044 is a test, but the implementation task to ensure the system halts with the specific error message is missing from the task list.

Tasks T070-T080 are stale/redundant. They duplicate the functionality of T047-T069 (e.g., T070 'ADD ATLAS SWAPPING FULL INTEGRATION TEST' duplicates T047 'ADD ATLAS SWAPPING INTEGRATION TEST' and T059 'ADD ATLAS SWAPPING FULL TEST'). These tasks reference non-existent or redundant requirements and should be removed.
